content.text: The current price of Wrapped Bitcoin (WBTC) is $87,304.63, while the price of ai16z is $0.2102.

Development efforts focused on package improvements and new features, specifically enhancing message memory by displaying the client on received messages. The work involved 7 contributors who merged 3 pull requests, leading to various improvements.
